nasb.text: Then Jeroboam built Shechem in the hill country of Ephraim, and lived there. And he went out from there and built Penuel.

esv.text: Then Jeroboam built Shechem in the hill country of Ephraim and lived there. And he went out from there and built Penuel.

cnv.text: 耶羅波安在以法蓮山地修築了示劍城，就住在城中，又從那裡出去，修建了毘努伊勒。

ccb.text: 耶罗波安在以法莲山区修建示剑城，住在那里。他后来又去修建毗努伊勒。
